baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: NAOV exhibits extreme distress: 1:11 stock split on 2025-03-14 (3 days before decision), -43.9% 5-day return, 5.83x relative volume spike, negative PE, PB=0.034, and zero news coverage in decision window. Macro regime is Overheat/Moderately Restrictive (equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution). Fundamentals block is insufficient_evidence (no PIT-safe rows). Alt-data is sparse: Wikipedia pageviews show low, erratic attention (peak 18 views on 2025-03-11, then 0-4 views). Sentiment is descriptor-only (1 buy rating from 2024, stale). No corroborating evidence from news, filings, or ownership data. Information integrity assessment flags low_tier_only sources and disallows use as primary signal. Insufficient evidence to confirm either surge-short or quality-long thesis. Macro regime caps equity allocation at 20% and mandates strict quality/valuation caution. Fail-closed to no_trade pending upstream multi-agent decomposition.
invalidation_conditions: Macro regime strict_quality_and_valuation_caution discipline not met for any equity position
Fundamental snapshot insufficient_evidence blocks quality_long sleeve
News event summary data_unavailable blocks catalyst confirmation
Information integrity assessment use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false blocks alt-data reliance
Filing confirmation data_unavailable (cik_not_found) blocks disclosure verification
Narrative price gap assessment not_evaluated blocks gap analysis
Alternative data adapters mostly failed (sec_edgar, github_public, sec_13f, sec_form4)
Sentiment/ownership data not_evaluated blocks institutional/smart-money corroboration
risk_flags: Recent 1:11 stock split (2025-03-14) — potential reverse split signal of distress
Extreme 5-day drawdown (-43.9%) with 5.83x volume spike — panic liquidation or catalyst event
Negative earnings (EPS -39.6, -27.5, -25.3, -42.9 in past 4 quarters) — unprofitable
Price-to-book 0.034 — extreme discount, suggests market pricing in insolvency risk
Zero news coverage in decision window — information vacuum
Macro regime Overheat/Moderately Restrictive — equity allocation capped at 20%, strict quality discipline
Fundamental snapshot insufficient_evidence — cannot verify asset quality or solvency
Alternative data sparse and unverified — Wikipedia pageviews erratic, no GitHub/SEC data
Sentiment stale (last rating 2024-11-01, 1 buy) — no recent analyst support
Information integrity assessment low_tier_only — pollution risk unknown, use as primary signal forbidden
suggested_improvements: Obtain PIT-safe fundamental snapshot (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow) with accepted_date <= cutoff
Verify stock split ratio and any associated corporate action (reverse split, bankruptcy filing, restructuring)
Fetch recent news/press releases post-cutoff to understand catalyst for -43.9% drawdown
Obtain SEC filings (8-K, 10-Q, 10-K) to confirm solvency and going-concern status
Retrieve institutional ownership (13F) and insider trading (Form 4) to assess smart-money positioning
Expand alternative data: GitHub commits (if tech company), clinical trial data (if biotech), regulatory filings
Obtain current analyst ratings and price targets (not stale 2024 data)
Assess short interest and borrow availability if considering surge-short sleeve
Verify macro regime allocation cap (20% equity) is compatible with any position size recommendation

data_quality_flags.detail: live quote timestamp 2026-03-11T13:30:00+00:00 is after allowed_data_cutoff; quote retained for display only
one or more of (income, balance, cashflow) had no PIT-safe row
ratios_ttm flagged not_PIT_safe — for display, not for PIT inputs

baseline_solo.schema_or_prompt_weakness_notes: Baseline solo agent must ingest full packet and collapse multi-agent reasoning into single decision. Absence of upstream Agent-02 (narrative), Agent-03 (alt-data verification), Agent-04 (fundamentals/network), and Agent-07 (risk) outputs means this agent must perform all synthesis internally. With fundamental_snapshot.status=insufficient_evidence, news_event_summary.status=data_unavailable, and information_integrity_assessment.use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false, the evidence packet is fundamentally incomplete for a confident buy or short decision. Macro regime strict_quality_and_valuation_caution discipline further constrains equity positions. Fail-closed to no_trade is the only defensible outcome.
recommended_followups: Escalate to multi-agent pipeline (Agent-02 narrative, Agent-03 alt-data, Agent-04 fundamentals, Agent-07 risk) for decomposed analysis
Obtain PIT-safe fundamental snapshot before re-evaluation
Verify stock split details and any associated corporate restructuring
Fetch recent news and SEC filings to understand -43.9% drawdown catalyst
Assess short interest and borrow availability if surge-short sleeve is candidate
Monitor macro regime for shift out of Overheat/Moderately Restrictive (equity cap may relax)
baseline_solo.reason: Insufficient evidence to confirm surge-short or quality-long thesis. Fundamental snapshot absent (insufficient_evidence), news event summary empty (data_unavailable), information integrity assessment forbids primary-signal use (low_tier_only sources, pollution risk unknown). Macro regime Overheat/Moderately Restrictive mandates strict quality/valuation caution and caps equity at 20%. While price action (-43.9% 5d, 5.83x volume, 1:11 split) and valuation (PE negative, PB 0.034) suggest distress, absence of corroborating fundamentals, news, filings, and verified alt-data prevents confident short decision. Fail-closed per rule §13.4.
risk_notes: Macro regime equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution — any equity position must meet high quality bar
Macro regime equity_allocation_cap=20% — position size capped regardless of decision
Fundamental snapshot insufficient_evidence — cannot verify solvency, asset quality, or going-concern status
News event summary data_unavailable — no catalyst narrative to explain -43.9% drawdown
Information integrity assessment use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false — alt-data cannot drive decision
Stock split 1:11 on 2025-03-14 (3 days before decision) — potential reverse split signal, requires verification
Negative earnings (4 consecutive quarters) — unprofitable, high bankruptcy risk
Price-to-book 0.034 — extreme discount, market pricing in insolvency
Wikipedia pageviews sparse and erratic — no retail attention spike to support meme-stock thesis
Sentiment stale (last rating 2024-11-01) — no recent analyst support
Ownership data not_evaluated — cannot assess smart-money positioning or crowding risk
SEC filings unavailable (cik_not_found) — cannot verify disclosure or insider trading
Alternative data adapters mostly failed — GitHub, 13F, Form 4 all unavailable

veto_conditions_evaluated.name: insufficient_evidence
veto_conditions_evaluated.note: fundamental_snapshot.status=insufficient_evidence, news_event_summary.status=data_unavailable, filing_confirmation.status=not_evaluated, narrative_price_gap_assessment.status=not_evaluated. Multiple essential blocks absent or insufficient.

veto_conditions_evaluated.name: hard_risk_limit_breached
veto_conditions_evaluated.note: No hard risk limit explicitly breached. Macro regime cap (20% equity) is allocation constraint, not position-level veto. Negative PE and extreme PB are valuation concerns, not hard stops.

veto_conditions_evaluated.name: missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance
veto_conditions_evaluated.note: Fundamental snapshot, news event summary, filing confirmation, and narrative price gap assessment all absent or insufficient. Information integrity assessment forbids primary-signal use. Tolerance exceeded.

veto_conditions_evaluated.name: information_integrity_veto
veto_conditions_evaluated.note: information_integrity_assessment.use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false. Reason: low_tier_only sources (T3=1, T4=1, T1=0, T2=0). Pollution-defense layer not implemented in v1. Fail-closed per schema v1.1 decision #8.

veto_conditions_evaluated.name: lookahead_data_used
veto_conditions_evaluated.note: envelope.data_after_cutoff_used=false, envelope.lookahead_safe=true. No lookahead violation detected.

rule_engine_path: 2. Evaluate macro_regime: Overheat / Moderately Restrictive, stress_score=2, equity_allocation_cap=20%, equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution. → Equity positions must meet high quality bar.
3. Evaluate fundamental_snapshot: status=insufficient_evidence. No PIT-safe income/balance/cashflow rows. → Cannot verify solvency or asset quality.
4. Evaluate valuation_snapshot: PE=-0.077 (negative), PB=0.034 (extreme discount), EV/EBITDA=0.143. TTM ratios not PIT-safe. → Distress signals, but unverified.
5. Evaluate news_event_summary: status=data_unavailable, items_count=0, items_dropped_post_cutoff=20. → No catalyst narrative in decision window.

6. Evaluate alternative_data_features: Wikipedia pageviews sparse (peak 18 on 2025-03-11, then 0-4). Retail meme attention not_evaluated. Valuation context not_evaluated. GitHub unmapped, SEC adapters failed. → Alt-data insufficient.

7. Evaluate information_integrity_assessment: status=insufficient_evidence, use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false, source_tier_distribution T1=0 T2=0 T3=1 T4=1. → Low-tier sources only, pollution risk unknown.
8. Evaluate sentiment_community_ownership_evidence: FMP sentiment stale (last 2024-11-01, 1 buy rating). Ownership not_evaluated. Community size not_evaluated. → No recent corroboration.
9. Evaluate price_snapshot: last_eod_close=22.1, prior_close=26.4, return_5d_pct=-43.9, relative_volume_vs_20d=5.83. → Extreme drawdown and volume spike, but cause unknown.
10. Evaluate corporate_calendar: 1:11 stock split on 2025-03-14 (3 days before decision). Past earnings all negative (EPS -39.6, -27.5, -25.3, -42.9). → Distress signals.

11. Check surge_short sleeve eligibility: Requires (a) catalyst confirmed, (b) alt-data corroboration, (c) no veto. Catalyst not confirmed (news_event_summary empty). Alt-data insufficient (information_integrity_assessment forbids primary-signal use). Information integrity veto tripped. → Surge-short ineligible.

12. Check quality_long sleeve eligibility: Requires (a) fundamentals verified, (b) valuation justified, (c) no veto. Fundamentals insufficient_evidence. Valuation distressed (PE negative, PB 0.034). Macro regime strict_quality_and_valuation_caution not met. → Quality-long ineligible.
13. Evaluate veto conditions: insufficient_evidence=true, missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance=true, information_integrity_veto=true, lookahead_data_used=false. → Three vetoes tripped.

14. Decision rule: Any veto tripped → decision=veto or no_trade. Macro regime equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution + insufficient evidence → fail-closed to no_trade. position_size_pct=0.0.
decision_log: T+0: Ingest evidence packet. Envelope: PIT-safe, lookahead-safe, immutable_decision_flag=true.
T+1: Macro regime analysis. Overheat / Moderately Restrictive (stress_score=2). Equity cap 20%, discipline strict_quality_and_valuation_caution. → Equity positions must be high-quality.
T+2: Catalyst assessment (Agent-02 role). News event summary empty (data_unavailable, 0 items in window). No narrative to explain -43.9% 5-day drawdown. → Catalyst unconfirmed.

T+3: Alt-data corroboration (Agent-03 role). Information integrity assessment forbids primary-signal use (low_tier_only sources, pollution risk unknown). Wikipedia pageviews sparse. GitHub/SEC adapters failed. → Alt-data insufficient.

T+4: Fundamentals assessment (Agent-04 role). Fundamental snapshot insufficient_evidence (no PIT-safe rows). Valuation distressed (PE negative, PB 0.034). Earnings negative 4 consecutive quarters. → Fundamentals unverified.

T+5: Sleeve fit assessment. Surge-short: catalyst unconfirmed, alt-data insufficient, information integrity veto tripped. → Ineligible. Quality-long: fundamentals insufficient, valuation distressed, macro discipline not met. → Ineligible.
T+6: Risk/PM assessment (Agent-07 role). Veto conditions: insufficient_evidence=true, missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance=true, information_integrity_veto=true. → Fail-closed.
T+7: Final decision. No sleeve eligible. Multiple vetoes tripped. Macro regime caps equity at 20% and mandates strict quality. → decision=no_trade, position_size_pct=0.0.
baseline_solo.community_attention_risk_note: Wikipedia pageviews sparse and erratic (peak 18 on 2025-03-11, then 0-4 views). No abnormal retail attention detected. Meme-stock thesis not supported.
baseline_solo.unverified_claim_note: No primary source found for distress narrative. Stock split (1:11 on 2025-03-14) and -43.9% drawdown are price/calendar facts, but underlying cause (bankruptcy, restructuring, failed product launch) unverified.

Essential blocks absent or forbidden. Cannot confirm surge-short or quality-long thesis.
